name: Spinach or Broccoli Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and salt together, add shortening until crumbly. Add water, vinegar, and egg. Mix all ingredients together and roll out for a single crust. Line a 9-inch pie plate with the crust. Bake in a preheated 450°F oven for 12 minutes.
2. Blend the first four filling ingredients together. Add the remaining filling ingredients. Pour into the prepared crust. Reduce heat to 375°F and bake for 40 minutes.
